title: Mirror Map Integrality Results — S_20 Sequence S_20
description: Exact rational arithmetic verification of Lian-Yau integrality conjecture for S_20(n) mirror map coefficients q_d.
conclusion: ALL q_d IN Z FOR d = 1, ..., 16. Lian-Yau integrality conjecture holds for the weight-5 Apéry-like sequence S_20.

generating_series.log_period: g(z) = sum_{n>=0} B(n) z^n, B(n) = sum_{k=0}^n C(n,k)^4 C(n+k,k) [4(H_n-H_{n-k}) + (H_{n+k}-H_n)]
